name: There's An AI For That
post_rules: Paid submission (~$300 last reported). Category selection matters — tool is indexed by task. Huge traffic (reports of millions of monthly visits) and the #1 AI newsletter. Worth it only for AI-first products with revenue to recoup.
description: Largest AI-tool directory (TAAFT). Paid listing. External reports cite 3-4M monthly visits — worth paying only for AI-first products with revenue to recoup.
